name: reserve_after_rejection_time_only
description: Regression for the 'LLM latches into clarify after a rejection' bug. Game Room is already booked Sunday 8am-12pm. Tenant asks for 10am-12pm (overlap → rejected). Then tenant types a bare time window '1-2pm'. The LLM (scripted to mimic prod misbehavior) returns access_intent: 'clarify' with NO time updates and a chatty re-narration of the prior rejection. The deterministic time-window safety net in maybeHandleAccessTurn must (a) parse '1-2pm' against the pinned dateForDay ('sunday'), (b) override the LLM intent back to reserve, (c) write startAt/endAt, (d) force handoff. The brain then books Sunday 1pm-2pm successfully.

turns.userMessage: i want to book the game room sunday 10am to 12pm

llm.reply: Got it — trying Sunday 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM.
It looks like Sunday 10 AM to 12 PM is also booked. The Game Room is reserved 8 AM to 12 PM that day. Would you like to try a different time?
